## SIGIL workflow template

### What this adds

- [ ] New workflow YAML in a category folder such as `ci/` or `automation/`
- [ ] Matching `properties/*.properties.json` metadata
- [ ] Clear public onboarding description
- [ ] Least-privilege `permissions`
- [ ] No paid-service dependency

### Template category

- [ ] Continuous integration
- [ ] Automation
- [ ] Code scanning
- [ ] Pages
- [ ] Other:

### Public sharing checks

- [ ] Filename is lower kebab case.
- [ ] Workflow and step names use sentence case.
- [ ] Metadata `name` is unique.
- [ ] Metadata `categories` are useful for discovery.
- [ ] Template can be copied into another repository without private context.

### Notes for reviewers

Describe what other developers can use this workflow for and what project layout it expects.
